title: Pan-Seared Herring with Lemon Butter Sauce
description: A classic French dish featuring pan-seared herring fillets served with a tangy lemon butter sauce. This recipe showcases the delicate flavor of herring.
instructions: Rinse the herring fillets under cold water and pat them dry with paper towels.
Season the herring fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add the unsalted butter to the skillet and let it melt.
Add the herring fillets to the skillet, skin side up.
Cook the herring fillets for 2-3 minutes or until they are cooked through.
Flip the herring fillets over and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Remove the herring fillets from the skillet and set them aside.
Reduce the heat to low and add the lemon juice to the skillet.
Scrape the bottom of the skillet to release any browned bits.
Return the herring fillets to the skillet and spoon some of the lemon butter sauce over them.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately.
